zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia von Formbach於大約1057年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲道恩薩爾姆時，她的父親Meginhard IV von Formbach38歲，母親Mathilda von Reinhausen26歲。她和Hermann Ier de Luxembourg至少有1個兒子。她去世於1118年2月25日在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆享年62歲，埋葬在法國德 艾斯特莫瑟勒梅斯。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia von Formbach was born about 1057, in Salm, Daun, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Meginhard IV von Formbach, was 38 and her mother, Mathilda von Reinhausen, was 26. She had at least 1 son with Hermann Ier de Luxembourg. She died on 25 February 1118, in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 62, and was buried in Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia von Formbach est née environ 1057, à Salm, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Meginhard IV von Formbach, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mathilda von Reinhausen, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Hermann Ier de Luxembourg. Elle est décédée le 25 février 1118, à Burgsponheim, Landkreis Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia von Formbach um 1057 in Salm, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Meginhard IV von Formbach 38 und ihre Mutter Mathilda von Reinhausen 26. Sie hatte mit Hermann Ier de Luxembourg mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 25. Februar 1118 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Burgsponheim, Landkreis Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Metz, Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia von Formbach è nata il circa 1057 nel Salm, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Meginhard IV von Formbach, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mathilda von Reinhausen, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Hermann Ier de Luxembourg. Morì il 25 febbraio 1118, nel Burgsponheim, Landkreis Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophia von Formbachが約1057年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズダウンサルムで生まれた時，父Meginhard IV von Formbachは38歳，母Mathilda von Reinhausenは26歳であった。彼女はHermann Ier de Luxembourgとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1118年2月25日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス バド クレウズナチブルグスプオンヘイムで62歳で死去し，フランスグランド エストモセルメッツにて埋葬された。

ko.Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-P: 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 크레우즈나치 버그스폰하임
ko.lifeSummary: Sophia von Formbach(이)가 대략 1057년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 도 살름에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Meginhard IV von Formbach(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilda von Reinhausen(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Hermann Ier de Luxembourg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1118년 2월 25일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 바드 크레우즈나치 버그스폰하임에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 모셀 멧즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia von Formbach nasceu aproximadamente 1057, em Salm, Daun, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Meginhard IV von Formbach, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda von Reinhausen, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Hermann Ier de Luxembourg. Ela faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1118, em Burgsponheim, Landkreis Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, França.

ru.Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-P: бургспоним, ландкрис бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia von Formbach родилась около 1057 г. в местности салм, даун, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Meginhard IV von Formbach было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilda von Reinhausen, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Hermann Ier de Luxembourg. Она умерла 25 февраля 1118 г. в местности бургспоним, ландкрис бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности мец, моселл, гранд эст, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Hermann Ier de Luxembourg. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1118, en Burgsponheim, Landkreis Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Metz, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia.
